subcodes.first_line: O Ali! Hearken unto that which thy Lord, the Sorrowful, the Lonely One, Who is encompassed by griefs from every side, revealeth unto thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا علی ان استمع ما یوحی الیک ربک المحزون الغریب الذی احاطته الاحزان من کل
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @station of the Manifestation of God, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @call to action
